title: SkillIntakeRecord
description: Record of the intake evaluation of an external skill. Produced by a skill evaluator, consumed by a reviewer and the future Phase 6+ quarantine pipeline. Phase 0-5 only allows reference or defer -- no install, clone, or execution.

skill_name.description: Name of the skill being evaluated.

source.description: Where the skill came from (URL, path, user request).

disposition.description: Intake disposition. Phase 0-5: 'install', 'absorb', and 'approved' are NOT valid dispositions -- skills cannot be installed or approved in this phase.

rationale.description: Why this disposition was chosen. Must be non-empty.

declared_tools.description: Tools the skill claims to use. Must not include forbidden Phase 0-5 tools (MCP config modification, UI-TARS/computer-use, package managers, external script execution).

gate_results.description: Gate check results for this skill intake.

target_phase.description: Phase when this skill could be reconsidered. Required when disposition is 'defer' or 'reject'.

examples.rationale: Phase 0-5 does not permit skill installation. Re-evaluate in Phase 6.
